sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE 1 = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Daniel' WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Bob');
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IN ('Alice', 'Charlie'));
